name: Firecrawl
description: A suite for integrating Firecrawl search, scraping, browser interaction, environment setup, and academic literature retrieval into applications.

timeline.details: Created generic fusion node 'firecrawl' via `gaia dev fuse`.
Set prerequisites via `gaia dev fuse`: web-scrape, web-search, browser-control, agent-environment-setup, literature-search.
Set prerequisites via `gaia dev fuse`: web-scrape, web-search, browser-control, agent-environment-setup, literature-search.
